html:
“Once constructed it will indicate the weather or very soon to be weather.”

-

The Rainometer is a Science Structure that predicts precipitation (Rain and Snow). The Rainometer has 3 stages, Sunny, Cloudy, and Raining. The arrow in the middle shows what weather is imminent or occurring at the time.

The Rainometer requires 2 Boards, 2 Gold Nuggets, and 2 Rope to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. 

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal The Magnificent Rainometer skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from October 11, 2018 to October 25, 2018, and from January 24, 2019 to January 31, 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
Loyal
Side Show Collection
The Magnificent Rainometer
Guess the rainfall.
Woven - Elegant
Swamp Collection
Primitive Rainometer
Predict rain the old-fashioned way.

Tips

  • This Structure is most useful while playing as WX-78, who takes damage in rain.

Trivia

  • The Rainometer was added in A Little Rain Must Fall update.

Assets

Primitive Rainometer

  • Build
  • Place
  • Hit
  • Meter
  • Burnt

Gallery

  • Rainometer Burnt
  • A Rainometer in cloudy weather.
  • A Rainometer in rainy weather.
  • A burnt Rainometer.
  • Rainometer as seen in the poster for A Little Rain Must Fall update.

Don't Starve

Rainometer
"Observe precipitation probabilities."
Object Info
Perk
Indicates the probability of rain and snow
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×2 ×2 ×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"rainometer"
“It measures cloudiness.”
–Wilson
“Rain is anti-fire. Boo!”
–Willow
“Splish! Splash!”
–Wolfgang
“It measures cloudiness. I like it when it's dreary.”
–Wendy
“WELCOME, BROTHER”
–WX-78
“Measure before you act.”
–Wickerbottom
“Rain makes the trees grow.”
–Woodie
“I could also just look up to learn the same thing.”
–Maxwell
“Those elements would never make a barometer at home.”
–Wagstaff
“Företells the cöming öf rain.”
–Wigfrid
“It must be powered by magic.”
–Webber
“Tells me when to paddle in.”
–Walani
“It measures moisture in the clouds.”
–Warly
“Sailor's arre walkin' rain-thingies!”
–Woodlegs
“YOU RAIN COME'TH?”
–Wilba
“Rain?”
–Wormwood
“A good aeronaut always has a barometer handy.”
–Wheeler
“That's a mighty fine gadget.”
–Winona
“Will it rain? Or will it shine?”
–Wortox
“Hope rain's coming!”
–Wurt
“A Pinetree Pioneer can smell rain coming a mile away.”
–Walter
“Pfft. I could just check the weather myself if I felt like it.”
–Wanda
“Once constructed it will indicate the weather or very soon to be weather.”
-
The Rainometer is a Science Structure that predicts precipitation (Rain and Snow). The Rainometer has 3 stages, Sunny, Cloudy, and Raining. The arrow in the middle shows what weather is imminent or occurring at the time.
The Rainometer requires 2 Boards, 2 Gold Nuggets, and 2 Rope to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rainometer là một Cấu trúc khoa học dự đoán lượng mưa (Mưa và Tuyết). Máy đo mưa có 3 giai đoạn, Nắng, Mây và Mưa. Mũi tên ở giữa cho biết thời tiết sắp xảy ra hoặc đang diễn ra vào thời điểm đó.

The Rainometer has 3 stages, ''Sunny'', ''Cloudy'', and ''Raining''. The arrow in the middle shows what weather is imminent or occurring at the time. The Rainometer requires 2 [[Boards]], 2 [[Gold Nuggets]], and 2 [[Rope]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype.  == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Structure Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal The Magnificent Rainometer''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from October 11, 2018 to October 25, 2018, and from January 24, 2019 to January 31, 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
